recommended_image.value: 仓库无 Dockerfile，文档未指定镜像，默认使用 openEuler 24.03 LTS

dependencies.source: docs/quick_start.md 依赖列表 + docs/summary.md 软件依赖 + CMakeLists.txt/cmake/*.cmake 构建配置
value: googletest（仅UT，cmake ExternalProject 自动下载编译）
CANN Toolkit >= 8.5.0（含 bisheng 编译器，从 OBS 社区镜像下载）
util-linux（flock 命令，CANN Toolkit 安装所需）
CANN Toolkit 从 https://ascend.devcloud.huaweicloud.com/artifactory/cann-run-mirror/software/master/ 下载社区版 run 包

execution_log.command: git clone https://gitcode.com/cann/atvoss.git /root/workspace/ttfhw-verify-0617/atvoss
execution_log.output: 仓库克隆成功，提交 9998053

execution_log.command: 读取 README.md、CMakeLists.txt、docs/quick_start.md、docs/summary.md、docs/directory_structure.md
execution_log.output: 文档阅读理解完成，提取依赖列表、构建命令、UT/ST 命令

execution_log.command: 读取 cmake/CMakeASCEND.cmake、cmake/third_party/gtest.cmake、.pre-commit-config.yaml
execution_log.output: 确定需要 CANN Toolkit（bisheng 编译器）、gtest 自动下载、pre-commit hooks（clang-format + OAT）

execution_log.command: 检查 Dockerfile 存在性: find . -name 'Dockerfile' -o -name 'Dockerfile.*'
execution_log.output: 仓库中无任何 Dockerfile 存在

execution_log.command: 检查 .devcontainer 目录: ls .devcontainer/
execution_log.output: ls: cannot access '.devcontainer/': No such file or directory

execution_log.command: pre-commit run --all-files
execution_log.output:
clang-format: failed (files modified by hook)
OAT Compliance Check: failed (exit code 1, 1 license header issue found then auto-resolved)
execution_log.error: clang-format 修改了10个文件格式；OAT 首次扫描报告1个 License Header Invalid 但最终 result.txt 显示 0 issues

execution_log.command: 检查 lint-runner 配置: ls .lint-runner* .lintrunner* 2>/dev/null
execution_log.output: 未找到 lint-runner 配置文件

execution_log.command: docker pull hub.oepkgs.net/openeuler/openeuler:24.03-lts
execution_log.output: Status: Image is up to date for hub.oepkgs.net/openeuler/openeuler:24.03-lts

execution_log.command: curl -L -o /tmp/Ascend-cann-toolkit_9.1.0_linux-x86_64.run https://ascend.devcloud.huaweicloud.com/artifactory/cann-run-mirror/software/master/20260617000327045/Ascend-cann-toolkit_9.1.0_linux-x86_64.run
execution_log.output: 下载 1.5G CANN Toolkit 完成

execution_log.command: docker run -d --name ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env --network host -v /tmp/Ascend-cann-toolkit_9.1.0_linux-x86_64.run:/tmp/cann.run:ro -v /root/workspace/ttfhw-verify-0617/atvoss:/workspace/atvoss:rw -w /workspace/atvoss hub.oepkgs.net/openeuler/openeuler:24.03-lts sleep infinity
execution_log.output: Container ID: 2684e986b71b

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'dnf install -y dnf-plugins-core'
execution_log.output: 安装 dnf-plugins-core 完成

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'dnf config-manager --enable powertools 2>/dev/null || true'
execution_log.output: powertools 仓库已启用

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'dnf install -y gcc gcc-c++ cmake make python3 python3-pip dos2unix gawk pigz which findutils glibc-devel libstdc++-devel zlib-devel diffutils file perl tar gzip'
execution_log.output: gcc 12.3.1, cmake 3.27.9, python 3.11.6 安装完成

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'cp /tmp/cann.run /root/cann.run && chmod +x /root/cann.run && /root/cann.run --install --force --install-path=/usr/local/Ascend --quiet' (首次尝试)
execution_log.output: cann-ge-executor 安装失败：flock: command not found
execution_log.error: 缺少 flock 命令，导致 CANN Toolkit 安装进程无法获取锁

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'dnf install -y util-linux && which flock'
execution_log.output: util-linux 安装完成，flock 位于 /usr/bin/flock

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'rm -rf /usr/local/Ascend && /root/cann.run --install --force --install-path=/usr/local/Ascend --quiet'
execution_log.output: Toolkit: Ascend-cann-toolkit_9.1.0_linux-x86_64 install success, installed in /usr/local/Ascend

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'export ASCEND_HOME_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0 && source /usr/local/Ascend/cann/set_env.sh && echo $ASCEND_HOME_PATH'
execution_log.output: /usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'export ASCEND_HOME_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0 && source /usr/local/Ascend/cann/set_env.sh && which bisheng && bisheng --version'
execution_log.output: bisheng at /usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0/bin/bisheng, clang version 15.0.5

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'export ASCEND_HOME_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0 && source /usr/local/Ascend/cann/set_env.sh && cd /workspace/atvoss && time bash scripts/build.sh -DSOC=ascend950 rms_norm'
execution_log.output: rms_norm 编译成功，output/bin/rms_norm (419KB)

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'export ASCEND_HOME_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0 && source /usr/local/Ascend/cann/set_env.sh && cd /workspace/atvoss && rm -rf build && time bash scripts/build.sh -DSOC=ascend950 abs'
execution_log.output: abs 编译成功，output/bin/abs (415KB)

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'export ASCEND_HOME_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0 && source /usr/local/Ascend/cann/set_env.sh && cd /workspace/atvoss && time bash scripts/build.sh -DSOC=ascend950 muls'
execution_log.output: muls 编译成功，output/bin/muls (414KB)

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'export ASCEND_HOME_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0 && source /usr/local/Ascend/cann/set_env.sh && cd /workspace/atvoss && rm -rf build && time bash scripts/build.sh -DSOC=ascend950 --host_ut'
execution_log.output:
gtest 1.14.0 自动下载编译，4/4 Host UT 全部 PASSED
test_arguments: 1 test PASSED
test_elewise_tiling: 1 test PASSED
test_expr_linearizer: 1 test PASSED
test_utility: 1 test PASSED

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env bash -c 'export ASCEND_HOME_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0 && source /usr/local/Ascend/cann/set_env.sh && cd /workspace/atvoss && rm -rf build && time bash scripts/build.sh -DSOC=ascend950 --example atvoss_examples'
execution_log.output:
3/3 examples 编译+仿真全部通过：abs PASSED, muls PASSED, rms_norm PASSED
All system tests passed!

execution_log.command: 验证 cannsim 日志: grep 'Accuracy verification passed' cann*/*.log
execution_log.output:
abs: Accuracy verification passed.
muls: Accuracy verification passed.
rms_norm: Accuracy verification passed.

execution_log.command: 清理 cannsim 中间产物
execution_log.output: cannsim_* 目录已删除

execution_log.command: docker stop ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env && docker rm ttfhw-atvoss-openeuler-env
execution_log.output: 容器已删除

documentation_gaps: 仓库无 Dockerfile，无法参考镜像和依赖安装方式
docs/quick_start.md 建议 Python <= 3.10，但 openEuler 24.03 默认 Python 3.11.6，实际使用无兼容问题
文档未提及 CANN Toolkit 安装需要 flock 命令（util-linux 包），在 openEuler 环境需手动安装

problems_encountered.problem: CANN Toolkit 9.1.0 安装失败：'flock: command not found'，安装脚本无法获取 /usr/local/Ascend 目录的锁文件
problems_encountered.solution: dnf install -y util-linux 安装 flock 命令后重试，清理 /usr/local/Ascend 目录并重新安装
problems_encountered.source: CANN Toolkit 安装日志 ge-executor 组件报错 'Get /usr/local/Ascend lockfile failed'
